text:
is a citizen of Xenotime and the father of Elisa. He is notably disdainful of Belsio, who his daughter is fond of. His name, Lemack, is never mentioned in the show itself, instead first being mentioned in the credits of Episode 11, however it wouldn't be known that this was the name of Elisa's father until it was confirmed on the official Hagaren website Hagaren website (https://www.hagaren.jp/old/chara/) and Dual Sympathy video game, Japanese version, character gallery: ゼノタイムに住む、レマック(左)の娘。 Lives in Xenotime, daughter of Remakku (left). and the Dual Sympathy video game. Dual Sympathy video game, English Version, Elisa's character gallery: Elisa The daughter of Remac, who lives in Xenotime. This is partially because Episode 11's credits also list a character named "Delfino", who has never been officially identified but is presumably another resident of Xenotime.
. Notably, the headshot of Lemack only appears in this game and not on Elisa's reference sheet on the Hagaren website.]]
